title: Kurtis Rogers — Software Engineer
metaDescription: Software engineer building accessible, maintainable web applications. Portfolio, experience, and contact.

hero.heading: Kurtis Rogers
hero.tagline: I build thoughtful, accessible web experiences with a focus on clarity and maintainability.

introduction.heading: Introduction
introduction.body: I'm a software engineer with a passion for crafting reliable, user-centred applications. I care deeply about accessibility, clean architecture, and shipping work that teams can maintain long after launch.

honourableDeveloper.heading: An Honourable Developer
honourableDeveloper.body: Good engineering means more than shipping features. It means writing code others can read, designing systems that scale gracefully, and leaving every codebase a little better than you found it.

cta.heading: Let's work together
cta.body: Interested in collaborating? I'd love to hear from you.
